name: David Grusch alleges that secret UAP programs were withheld from congressional oversight
summary: David Grusch has alleged that classified UAP-related programs existed outside effective congressional oversight and were not fully disclosed to authorized lawmakers.
status: Allegation presented in public testimony; not established as fact by GreyAlien.
evidenceNote: This page records who made the claim, where it appeared, and what documents or responses are connected to it.
